division_title: REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE
text: Whenever any trailer coach is in this State without the registration fee having first been paid as required by this code, the fee is delinquent.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3. REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE [4000 - 9808]
### Chapter 6. Registration and Weight Fees [9101 - 9808]
#### Article 4. Payment of Fees [9550 - 9564]
##### § 9555

Whenever any trailer coach is in this State without the registration fee having first been paid as required by this code, the fee is delinquent.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: Whenever any trailer coach is in this State without the registration fee having first been paid as required by this code, the fee is delinquent.
